name: theoria
description: Understanding-first autonomous research companion — produces publishable papers + educational guides + compound knowledge from any research topic

semantic_scholar_api_key.title: Semantic Scholar API Key
semantic_scholar_api_key.description: API key for higher rate limits on literature search (optional, free tier works without it)

latex_compiler.title: LaTeX Compiler
latex_compiler.description: Preferred compiler for paper output: tectonic, pdflatex, xelatex, or none (default: none, produces .tex only)

default_venue.title: Default Venue
default_venue.description: Default target venue for papers: neurips, icml, acl, ieee, acm, or generic
